steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “No matter what others may do in the future, nobody can ever ______ these women as the first” reveals the decisive clue: the blank needs a word meaning to replace or displace someone from a position.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Supplant means to take the place of someone, directly matching the idea that nobody can ever replace these women in their position as the first.

Stipulate (to demand as a condition), induce (to persuade), and engender (to produce) do not express displacement.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
